owner_handoff: owner_handoff=field owner collects same safe_evidence_ref real execution result materials
owner_handoff=Robot owner reconciles task_record and route completion before any acceptance
owner_handoff=Full-stack keeps execution result review handoff panel read-only
blocker_summary: blocked=real task_record and route completion signal missing
blocked=real elevator door state, target floor confirmation, and human assistance record missing
blocked=real dropoff/cancel completion, delivery result, and true phone/browser evidence missing
next_required_real_materials: next_required_real_materials=real Nav2/fixed-route runtime log and route completion signal
next_required_real_materials=real elevator door state, target floor confirmation, and human assistance note
next_required_real_materials=real dropoff or cancel completion plus delivery result
reconciliation_guidance: reconciliation_guidance=match review decision, task_record, route completion, terminal outcome, and phone/browser summaries under the same safe evidence_ref
reconciliation_guidance=do not mark accepted until real materials reconcile under the same safe evidence_ref
rerun_guidance: rerun_guidance=backfill missing real materials first, then rerun the execution result review handoff gate
rerun_guidance=mobile panel only displays the backfill request and keeps control surfaces unchanged
robot_diagnostics_field_evidence_rerun_e.safe_copy: 现场证据复跑执行结果复核交接 safe copy: handoff_status=ready_for_field_owner_backfill_not_proven, source=software_proof, not_proven, safe_to_control=false, delivery_success=false, primary_actions_enabled=false.
robot_diagnostics_field_evidence_rerun_e.safe_phone_copy: 现场证据复跑执行结果复核交接 fixture 只读展示 safe evidence_ref、source review decision、owner handoff、blocker summary、next required real materials 和 fail-closed boundary；这是 source=software_proof / not_proven。
